title: ERP-MES Pharma (ISA-95/ISA-88)
description: Pharmaceutical (solid dosage) overlay for erp-mes-core: quarantine and batch release with electronic signatures (21 CFR Part 11), double verification of dispensing weighments, electronic batch record sections, DataMatrix serialization with aggregation
changelog: 1.0.0 - pharma (solid dosage) overlay on erp-mes-core: 5 migrations (20 GMP event codes, solid-dosage equipment/personnel/materials/segments, demo batch order with eBR sections), 7 BFF functions, 3 dashboards, 4 reports, singleton hub

changelog.notes: Initial release: solid dosage pharma overlay on erp-mes-core 1.0.0, certified by ErpMesPharmaOverlayTest cross-bundle scenarios
